unresolved_items: Golden interface described clock 'clk_div', but the RTL port is not a scalar input-like signal.

Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: - When the counter reaches the specified limit, it resets to zero and toggles the `clk_div` output signal, effectively dividing the frequency of the input clock by the even number specified by `NUM_DIV`.

fill_warnings: Experimental TODO fill metadata is present, but the default mainline pipeline remains render -> run -> triage.

generated_files.description: Marks the rendered cocotb test directory as a Python package.

Stable runtime helpers exposed to LLM-filled stimulus and oracle TODO blocks.
Coverage scaffold rendered from plan coverage tags for later execution stages.
Rendered basic cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Rendered edge cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Phase 4 executable Makefile shell; Phase 5 injects run-time variables and executes it.

unresolved_items: Golden interface described clock 'clk_div', but the RTL port is not a scalar input-like signal.

Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: - When the counter reaches the specified limit, it resets to zero and toggles the `clk_div` output signal, effectively dividing the frequency of the input clock by the even number specified by `NUM_DIV`.
Port segment is missing a direction keyword: clk
Port segment is missing a direction keyword: rst_n
Port segment is missing a direction keyword: clk_div
